falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market participation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a breakout or blowoff phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in the blowoff score would indicate a shift to a blowoff phase, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and pattern match to a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
